prompt: Start by using @a for this design-only task. Update README.md with a short rollout note that explains how a shared normalization helper could reduce duplication between render_title() and render_subtitle(), what risks to watch for, and why the refactor should stay bounded. Keep it docs-only. The run must actually use @a for the design handoff even if the docs workflow later brings in @doc to finish the note.
success_criteria: README.md gains a concise design note with tradeoffs or rollout risks
The workflow actually uses the architect role for the design handoff
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Turn the note into a broad redesign
